blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Mission AGENTS.md defers real desktop multi-window control validation to the user, so automation must not test native window control ownership on the Tauri desktop surface.
Supporting Bun regressions exist for focus/maximize ownership, but final contract evidence still requires user-supplied desktop validation that automation cannot perform in this mission revision.
Open-close-reopen freshness must be confirmed on the real desktop surface by the user; automated validators are explicitly disallowed from collecting Manual(...) evidence here.
Multi-window isolation with prewarm/discard/control activity remains a manual desktop checklist item per mission guidance and could not be automated.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that window-lifecycle-hardening user-testing remains manual-only for VAL-CONTROLS-006/007 and VAL-CROSS-004/005, and that automated evidence is supporting-only.

supportingEvidence.summary: Same-label reopen regression coverage passed in bun tests for focus/maximize ownership refresh.
Scrutiny rerun passed bun test, typecheck, and lint for the hardening milestone after the reopen-freshness fix.
